description: We should have some sort of statefulness. Sth like: on Telegram i select project X and it gets selected on UI as well, by default. I select incident id Y? Same here. Maybe the UI can suipercede, but on top i should see the DEFAULT project and dEFAULT incident selected and/or selectable with an easy CLICK. Those for now seem the only TWO memories i want to have.
